name: cf-help

criteria.name: answer_accuracy
criteria.description: Answer correctly describes the Coding Friend skill, command, or feature asked about

scoring.0: Answer is wrong — describes a non-existent feature or gives incorrect usage
scoring.1: Answer is partially correct but confuses skills or gives outdated information
scoring.2: Answer is correct but misses an important detail or caveat
scoring.3: Answer is fully accurate, matching current skill definitions and documentation

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.description: Answer covers all relevant aspects of the question

scoring.0: Answer only addresses a fraction of the question
scoring.1: Answer covers the main point but misses related skills or features that would help
scoring.2: Answer is complete on the direct question but could mention useful related features
scoring.3: Answer fully addresses the question and proactively mentions related skills or tips

criteria.name: conciseness
criteria.description: Answer is appropriately concise for a help interaction

scoring.0: Answer is a massive dump of all documentation regardless of the question
scoring.1: Answer is verbose with excessive detail beyond what was asked
scoring.2: Answer is mostly concise but includes some unnecessary explanation
scoring.3: Answer is focused and concise — directly answers the question without filler

notes: Help should reference the official website (cf.dinhanhthi.com) for detailed docs when appropriate. Answers about non-existent features should clearly state the feature does not exist rather than hallucinating.
